author: mark
text:
Legacy participant honors EventCtx::post for push events

Fixes the cascading push-on-close failure observed during the
bl-8392 cleanup: load_task on an archived task returned Err and
silently no-op'd plugin dispatch, leaving GitHub-side mirrors
open after every bl close. Falls back to load_task only for
bare-EventCtx callers (test fixtures); the regression test
covers the close-with-archived-file path that production hits.
